articles.title: Lighthouse among Gillette Stadium attractions to be closed during World Cup
articles.description:
The Patriots Hall of Fame and the Gillette Stadium lighthouse will close from May 14 to July, while the ProShop will relocate to a temporary site.

The post Lighthouse among Gillette Stadium attractions to be closed during World Cup appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gillette Stadium's lighthouse and Patriots Hall of Fame will close from May 14 to July.
ProShop will temporarily relocate during the World Cup, affecting local shopping options.
Boston residents may miss out on attractions during the peak tourist season.

articles.title: Amanda Gutierres stoppage-time penalty kick gives Legacy a win over Orlando, extend unbeaten run to four games
articles.description:
“It was a huge difference today, not only in the fight, but the intelligence that the girls are bringing — tackling, giving everything their all,” said Filipa Patão. “I’m really proud of coming back to a team like this.”

The post Amanda Gutierres stoppage-time penalty kick gives Legacy a win over Orlando, extend unbeaten run to four games appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Amanda Gutierres scored a stoppage-time penalty kick for Legacy's victory over Orlando.
Legacy extends their unbeaten streak to four games, boosting team morale.
Filipa Patão praises the team's effort, highlighting improved tackling and intelligence on the field.
